title: poa subpurpurea
intro: Poa subpurpurea, also known as the purple blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa subpurpurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Poa subpurpurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
